trivia_bullets.text: Adventure card: Curry Favor ({B} sorcery — drain X life from each opponent / gain X life, X = Knights you control) + Smitten Swordmaster (2/1 Human Knight, lifelink, {1}{B}). Tight synergy: cast Curry Favor with a full Knights board for massive life swing, then cast the creature from exile.

Flavor text: 'My quest? Why, to marry Ayara. Or die trying.' Ayara, First of Locthwain (ELD 75) is an immortal elf queen who buried many suitors through the centuries. The Swordmaster's ambition reads as tragicomic hubris — a common human knight courting an ancient elf ruler.
sources: WebSearch: Ayara MTG lore via mtg.wiki

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 7,674. Sees Knight tribal Commander play; Curry Favor can be a win-con drain effect with a full board.
sources: WebSearch: Smitten Swordmaster EDH via tappedout.net

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Taylor Ingvarsson. First and only printing as of research date.

related_cards.name: Ayara, First of Locthwain
related_cards.note: Named object of the Swordmaster's quest; flavor-direct connection

related_cards.name: Curry Favor
related_cards.note: Adventure face; functionally inseparable from the creature
